settings.subtitle: For The Long Miles
settings.description:
Ultra extends anti-chafe protection beyond where standard products fail. Pharmaceutical-grade barrier technology maintains effectiveness through sweat saturation, elevation changes, and the prolonged mechanical stress of ultra-distance events. Six-plus hours. Single application. The formulation built for runners who understand that mile 50 is where real running begins.

Advanced Barrier Technology: Clinically formulated for endurance athletes. Film-forming silicone complex with water-resistant polymers provides 6-12+ hour friction protection without reapplication.

Dermatologist Tested: Sweat-proof, humidity-resistant formula engineered for extreme duration events. Non-comedogenic. Safe for sensitive skin.

Key Benefits:

  • Extended anti-chafe protection: 6-12+ hours
  • Sweat and humidity resistant
  • Maintains barrier integrity through extreme duration
  • Water-resistant film technology
  • Engineered for 50K-100+ mile events
  • No mid-race reapplication needed
settings.how_to_apply: Apply to completely dry skin 30-45 minutes before race start. This allows film formation to complete. Cover all high-friction zones thoroughly: feet (especially between toes), inner thighs, underarms, groin, nipples, pack contact points. Build coverage in areas prone to chafing during previous long efforts.
settings.ingredients_list: Dimethicone, Cyclopentasiloxane, Squalane (Olive-Derived), Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, Oryza Sativa (Rice) Bran Wax, Copernicia Cerifera (Carnauba) Wax, Tocopherol (Vitamin E), Bisabolol, Allantoin, Hippophae Rhamnoides (Sea Buckthorn) Fruit Oil, Calophyllum Inophyllum (Tamanu) Seed Oil
settings.shipping_info: Free shipping on orders over $50. Standard shipping: 3-5 business days.
settings.cross_sell_text: For post-race recovery, pair with Aura Recover — ceramide barrier repair for damaged skin.

settings.heading: Key Ingredients
settings.description: Engineered for 6+ hours of continuous protection. Every ingredient is chosen for maximum endurance performance.

settings.name: Coconut Oil
settings.description: Creates an enduring moisture barrier engineered for 6+ hours of continuous protection.

settings.name: Cocoa Butter
settings.description: Rich natural butter that maintains its protective properties even under extreme conditions.

settings.name: Beeswax
settings.description: Creates a durable, breathable film that reduces friction without clogging pores.

settings.name: Vitamin E
settings.description: Supports skin recovery during and after ultra-distance events.

settings.quote: 100 miles through the Sierra Nevada and not a single hotspot. Aura Ultra is non-negotiable race kit.
settings.author: Jake M.

settings.quote: Applied once at the start of UTMB. Still working at mile 80.
settings.author: Elena V.
